page_metadata.biotools__summary: apex is an R package that can be used for phylogenetic studies. It implements new object classes, which extend existing standards for storing DNA and amino acid sequences, and provides a number of convenient tools for handling, visualizing and analysing these data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: apex is an R package that can be used for phylogenetic studies. It implements new object classes, which extend existing standards for storing DNA and amino acid sequences, and provides a number of convenient tools for handling, visualizing and analysing these data.
